content.full_text:
Mar 26 10:23 AM '90

Warren Harwood
Councilman, Ninth District
6056 Falcon Avenue
Long Beach, CA 90805

March 23, 1990

Fair Political Practices Commission
428 J Street, Suite 800
P.O. Box 807
Sacramento, CA 95804-0807

Dear Sirs:

On March 8, 1990 Trish Glassey was advised by Wayne Imberi of your office that it was permissible to transfer funds from my Long Beach City Council election committee to my State Board of Equalization election committee given that the contributions met proposition 73 standards limiting amounts contributors may give in one fiscal year.

Please confirm, in writing, that a transfer of funds from my Long Beach City Council election committee to my State Board of Equalization election committee is permissible, and the date the relevant ruling came into effect.

Thank you for your assistance.

Sincerely,

Warren Harwood
Councilman
